description: A reader should fail sync when the seed replaces advertised heads and then requests an object that was only reachable from the withdrawn root set.

assertions.description: Reader rejects WANT because replace=true withdrew the old sync roots before the stale dependency was requested again.
Reader does not keep writing the stale sync state after the withdrawn-root WANT violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with a post-HELLO advertised-root replacement violation.
The harness keeps the normal peer-store transcript but injects a replacing HEADS plus a stale WANT before BYE.
